query: SELECT bl.id, bl.bl_number, bl.status, bl.origin_port, bl.destination_port, bl.customer_id, c.name as customer_name FROM bills_of_lading bl LEFT JOIN customers c ON bl.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY bl.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3VZFt7SKQu8xeVW.035f96cf6ffd --database mdqtoTdxUgyafXfA49s4Hx --execute SELECT bl.id, bl.bl_number, bl.status, bl.origin_port, bl.destination_port, bl.customer_id, c.name as customer_name FROM bills_of_lading bl LEFT JOIN customers c ON bl.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY bl.id;
